title: CreatorSMP
description: THE modpack used on the CreatorSMP server
body:
![CreatorSMP lobby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b6260aa5eb1512b15315ad7c161434079bde877.jpeg)

**INFO:**
This pack aims to maintain the original Minecraft experience while also providing optimization, quality of life and a bit of ✨spark✨. New versions are based on our CreatorSMP Hardcore project.

Every player on the CreatorSMP (dutch btw) uses this pack. Even Jeremy Frieser said "I love it". Which means he loves it! (He also said this for season 2)

![Hardcore heart divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/131bc84d0aaf3ef35db95118c6359cd0da1cfa09.png)

### HOW TO INSTALL:
1. Download the Modrinth app
2. Search for CreatorSMP and click install
3. Run the instance, check your settings / keybinds and have fun!


Credits:  
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

![Hardcore heart divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/131bc84d0aaf3ef35db95118c6359cd0da1cfa09.png)

**Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/pZebhUmnQp)**

For any **questions** please contact me through [x/Twitter or Instagram](https://linktr.ee/DuncanMassink)

![Hardcore heart divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/131bc84d0aaf3ef35db95118c6359cd0da1cfa09.png)

FAQ:  
Q: Will we update this pack to 1.21.5?  
A: Unlikely. We base our packs on the events we create. If we release a new event, which might happen a few updates later, we'll update the pack!
